translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jude, bondman of Jesus Christ, and brother of James, to the called ones beloved inGod [the] Father and preserved in Jesus Christ:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Mercy to you, and peace, and love be multiplied.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Beloved, using all diligence to write to you of our common salvation, I have been obliged to write to you exhorting [you] to contend earnestly for the faith once delivered to the saints.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For certain men have got in unnoticed, they who of old were marked out beforehand to this sentence, ungodly [persons], turning the grace of ourGod into dissoluteness, and denying our only Master and Lord Jesus Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But I would put you in remembrance, you who once knew all things, that the Lord, having saved a people out of [the] land of Egypt, in the second place destroyed those who had not believed.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And angels who had not kept their own original state, but had abandoned their own dwelling, he keeps in eternal chains under gloomy darkness, to [the] judgment of [the] great day;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: as Sodom and Gomorrha, and the cities around them, committing greedily fornication, in like manner with them, and going after other flesh, lie there as an example, undergoing the judgment of eternal fire.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Yet in like manner these dreamers also defile [the] flesh, and despise lordship, and speak railingly against dignities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But Michael the archangel, when disputing with the devil he reasoned about the body of Moses, did not dare to bring a railing judgment against [him], but said, [The] Lord rebuke thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But these, whatever things they know not, they speak railingly against; but what even, as the irrational animals, they understand by mere nature, in these things they corrupt themselves.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Woe to them! because they have gone in the way of Cain, and given themselves up to the error of Balaam for reward, and perished in the gainsaying of Core.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are spots in your love-feasts, feasting together [with you] without fear, pasturing themselves; clouds without water, carried along by [the] winds; autumnal trees, without fruit, twice dead, rooted up;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: raging waves of the sea, foaming out their own shames; wandering stars, to whom has been reserved the gloom of darkness for eternity.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Enoch, [the] seventh from Adam, prophesied also as to these, saying, Behold, [the] Lord has come amidst his holy myriads,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: to execute judgment against all; and to convict all the ungodly of them of all their works of ungodliness, which they have wrought ungodlily, and of all the hard [things] which ungodly sinners have spoken against him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are murmurers, complainers, walking after their lusts; and their mouth speaks swelling words, admiring persons for the sake of profit.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But ye, beloved, remember the words spoken before by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: that they said to you, that at [the] end of the time there should be mockers, walking after their own lusts of ungodlinesses.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These are they who set [themselves] apart, natural [men], not having [the] Spirit.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But ye, beloved, building yourselves up on your most holy faith, praying in the Holy Spirit,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: keep yourselves in the love ofGod, awaiting the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ unto eternal life.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And of some have compassion, making a difference,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: but others save with fear, snatching [them] out of the fire; hating even the garment spotted by the flesh.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But to him that is able to keep you without stumbling, and to set [you] with exultation blameless before his glory,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: to the onlyGod our Saviour, through Jesus Christ our Lord, [be] glory, majesty, might, and authority, from before the whole age, and now, and to all the ages. Amen.
